name: haddock
description: Living plan manager — session-scoped implementation plans for agentic projects
author: krisravishankar

commands.name: haddock:init
commands.description: Initialize a new project with .haddock/ structure

commands.name: haddock:plan
commands.description: Generate a session-based implementation plan from a PRD

commands.name: haddock:replan
commands.description: Revise the plan based on new context or discoveries

commands.name: haddock:next
commands.description: Pick the next session to work on from the dependency graph

commands.name: haddock:done
commands.description: Record session outcomes and update plan status

commands.name: haddock:status
commands.description: View progress across sessions and stories
